text: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
summary: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
ai_summary: Elon announces that Grok, xAI's AI assistant integrated into 𝕏, is successfully implementing automatic translation and cross-language post recommendations as a core feature. This demonstrates progress on a key product capability that enhances platform engagement by breaking down language barriers and expanding content discoverability across 𝕏's global user base.
embed_html:
Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 29, 2026

text:
Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. 

Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades. https://t.co/XkwdUIPeKy
summary: Tesla is making a big investment in Japan with service & Superchargers. Many of the parts in Teslas are made in Japan. Panasonic has been our biggest strategic supplier over the past 2 decades.
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces Tesla's strategic investment in Japan focused on expanding service centers and Supercharger infrastructure, highlighting the company's long-term dependency on Japanese suppliers—particularly Panasonic for battery components over the past two decades. The post illustrates a key business lesson: maintaining and deepening relationships with critical supply chain partners is essential for scaling manufacturing globally, and this requires localized infrastructure investments to support both operations and customer service in key supplier markets.
embed_html:

ai_summary: Elon Musk reports that a SpaceX Falcon 9 booster has completed its 34th flight, demonstrating significant progress in rocket reusability and operational cadence. This milestone highlights SpaceX's engineering achievement in designing rockets for multiple launches, directly supporting the company's mission to reduce launch costs and increase frequency—core business objectives for both commercial spaceflight and Starlink deployment.
embed_html:
34th flight of this booster pic.twitter.com/sM4lQFTGA6

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 31, 2026

text: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6
summary: 34th launch & landing of the same rocket
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced SpaceX's 34th successful launch and landing of the same Falcon 9 rocket, demonstrating the company's achievement in rocket reusability. This milestone illustrates SpaceX's core business model of reducing launch costs through rocket reusability, a critical competitive advantage in the commercial space industry and key to making space transportation economically viable for satellite deployment and cargo missions.
embed_html:
34th launch & landing of the same rocket https://t.co/OK4xGVFSs6

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) March 30, 2026
